title: Mxthy's Kebab World
description: Mxthy's kebab world is a resource pack that will change items and aesthetics features into kebabs
body:
# Mxthy's kebab world is a resource pack that will change items and aesthetics features



## 💥Changes


### v1.3 🚀NEW kebab totem
![totem kebab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58d0656b247959a094e15db03dddac2a92eb5a79_0.webp)


### v1.2 💫Fixed Some Bugs


### v1.1 🥙NEW hunger bar


![hunger bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eafcca00c34830853f0f512a648e44bf040b80e_0.webp)


![hunger hunger bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43d2d64d93b5a5fa5dc0c73780421488a26aadee.png)


### 🍎 Compatible with [Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)

![appleskin compability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e79184173b021ad035288804f626f2669a3f46f.png)

### v1.0 🗡️Kebab swords 

 
- Wooden Sword
- Stone Sword
- Iron Sword
- Golden Sword
- Diamond Sword
- Netherite Sword
### 🔥Versions
There are different version based on all the type of swords. 


![swords version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2803940ef47a40095fba9ba07f464a71500ae58_0.webp)


</details>


# 👾Works with:
- Optifine
- Sodium
- Modrinth app
- Curseforge app
- Forge
- Fabric
- Neoforged


![That resource pack works with:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6abdadfa1bc191e6cbe286c1b613ad9ea775d6a7.jpeg)



# ⚙️Compability
Tested  in 1.21.4 and worked with 300+ of the most famous resource packs.

Tested in 1.21.4 and worked with 100+ of the most famous mods.
(Using [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) )

Works with shaders.



Compatible for 1.8+ minecraft versions
# 🌪️How can i report issues?
For every problem/issue you can report issues commenting to this [issue report](https://github.com/Mxthy7/Mxthy-s-kebab-world/issues)
or comment to this  [other one](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mxthys-kebab-wrap)

### There will be update for other items like:

- Every Axe with variants
- Every Pickaxe with variants
- Every Shovel with variants
- Every ~~Hoe~~ with variants
- Trident
- Mace
- Other

# 🌱Other downloads link


Curseforge: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mxthys-kebab-world](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mxthys-kebab-world)

Github: [https://github.com/Mxthy7/Mxthy-s-kebab-world](https://github.com/Mxthy7/Mxthy-s-kebab-world)
